metadata.description: AI-First SDLC Practices — plugin family for zero-debt development

plugins.name: sdlc-core
plugins.description: Core SDLC rules, validators, enforcement, and workflows

plugins.name: sdlc-team-common
plugins.description: Cross-cutting specialist agents — architects, researchers, performance engineers

plugins.name: sdlc-team-ai
plugins.description: AI/ML specialist agents — architects, prompt engineers, RAG designers

plugins.name: sdlc-team-fullstack
plugins.description: Web full-stack agents — frontend, backend, API, data, DevOps, UX & integration architects

plugins.name: sdlc-team-mobile
plugins.description: Shared mobile base — cross-platform mobile architecture and interaction UX agents (install with sdlc-team-ios and/or sdlc-team-android)

plugins.name: sdlc-team-ios
plugins.description: iOS/iPadOS development — Apple HIG, SwiftUI, release engineering & performance agents + TestFlight/App Store/scaffold skills & submission pre-flight checks (pairs with sdlc-team-mobile)

plugins.name: sdlc-team-android
plugins.description: Android development — Material Design 3, Jetpack Compose, app architecture, Gradle, Play Store release & performance agents (pairs with sdlc-team-mobile)

plugins.name: sdlc-team-cloud
plugins.description: Cloud infrastructure agents — cloud, container, SRE specialists

plugins.name: sdlc-team-security
plugins.description: Security agents — security, compliance, privacy specialists

plugins.name: sdlc-team-pm
plugins.description: Project management agents — agile coach, delivery manager, progress tracking

plugins.name: sdlc-team-docs
plugins.description: Documentation agents — technical writer, documentation architect

plugins.name: sdlc-lang-python
plugins.description: Python-specific validation, patterns, and expert agents

plugins.name: sdlc-lang-swift
plugins.description: Swift language expert — idiomatic Swift 6.2, strict concurrency, value semantics, generics, macros, SwiftPM (pairs with sdlc-team-ios)

plugins.name: sdlc-knowledge-base
plugins.description: Filesystem-based project knowledge base — librarian agent, hash-tracked indexes, cross-library queries with priming + synthesis, audit log, parallel map-reduce bulk ingest, ingest/query/lint operations

plugins.name: sdlc-programme
plugins.description: Programme SDLC bundle — formal waterfall phase gates with mandatory cross-phase review (Method 1 substrate)

plugins.name: sdlc-assured
plugins.description: Regulated-industry SDLC bundle (Method 2): positional namespace IDs, bidirectional traceability, DDD decomposition, KB extension to code, standard-specific exports (DO-178C, IEC 62304, ISO 26262, FDA DHF). v0.2.0: audit-ready at the tooling layer — typed evidence statuses, multi-format evidence model, platform-neutral dependency extractor, indirect DES-mediated coverage

plugins.name: sdlc-workflows
plugins.description: Containerised delegated execution — Archon DAG workflows with team-scoped Docker containers, tiered termination, 4 bundled workflows, 6 skills
